limitation: Some previously retained rows now downgrade or fall out of issue formation because the cleaner family-bounded structure refuses ambiguous or contaminated evidence.

required_checks.details: issue_population_index.json includes issue_evidence_tier, issue_focus_text, cluster_input_text, contamination_flags, and issue_family for every selected row.
Only core_issue_evidence rows seed issue objects; excluded_noise_or_praise rows remain outside issue formation.
v2_vs_v1_comparison.json contains row-level excluded or downgraded examples, reassignment examples, and mechanical title change examples.
pricing_access_limits purity is evaluated against the frozen v1 retained rows under the same bounded v2 structural rules.
Issue titles are compared with a bounded mechanical-title heuristic rather than narrative judgment.
Grouping fidelity is measured as dominant-family alignment among retained rows.
